- Repeat purchase rate: 6.46%

## Alerts

## Recommended Actions
- Replenish SKUs with <7 days cover, prioritising top revenue lines.
- Push repeat-purchase campaigns into Klaviyo for churn-risk customers.
- Review discount-heavy orders for margin leakage.
- Shift inventory away from overstocked branches into demand nodes.

summary_lines: Online R850.00 from 1 orders, AOV R850.00.
Physical MTD R41,453.70, focus store Centurion at 1.80% of target.
0 high-value lapsed customers, 8 winning SKUs at stock risk, 1 approval-gated recommendations.
highlights: Online trade delivered R850.00 from 1 orders at 50.00% GP.
Physical stores are sitting on R41,453.70 MTD revenue, with Centurion currently the main pace risk.
8 winning SKUs are already showing stock pressure, led by DELFRAN - Family Starter Pack.
Customer base shows 0 high-value lapsed customers and 81 buyers due for repeat.
Top geo demand is concentrated in Pretoria with R31,858.22 in the 90d view.
Competitor scan shows 6 clear price wins and 0 price-position risks.
actions: Protect winning SKU DELFRAN - Family Starter Pack first, it produced R2,985.00 in 90d and is already under stock pressure.
Treat Centurion as the branch priority, it is running at 1.8% of MTD target with pressure on same-day recovery.

Push the next content batch around 'Current TikTok winners cluster around brain fog, stress, sleep, and energy hooks.' and point it at NEUROACTIVE - Neuro Day Plus - 60 Veg Capsules, PRIMESELF - Magnesium Complex - 60 Veg Capsules, DELFRAN - Naleo Spectrum - 30 x 5g Scoops.

guardrails: Recommendation only. Do not execute automatically.
